Week #22 - January 12th-January 19th

January 12, 2026 <<<<<<< HEAD
=======
>>>>>>> 7976bd6f45e7d2662787d798323f8c70531eb58c

This week, I refined my plant electrophysiology board for the DSRF regional fair. Tweaking the presentation and making sure every detail was clear took time, but I’m proud of how polished it looks.

I’m also thrilled to have been invited to travel to Pasadena for a series of Enterprise Neurosystem conferences, with the possibility of a NASA JPL and Caltech tour. The opportunity to meet with researchers and see cutting‑edge labs energizes me to keep pushing forward.

Despite the excitement, my schedule remains packed: I’m cramming schoolwork, preparing for the March SAT, and carving out time to work out 4–5 days a week. Balancing ambition with discipline is a challenge, but staying consistent with my habits is helping me seize each opportunity without burning out.
